name: @mysterai/theia-preferences
description: Extension Theia pour la gestion des préférences GeoApp

scripts.copy:assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs-extra'); const path=require('path'); fs.copySync('src/browser/style', 'lib/browser/style'); const schemaSource=path.resolve('../../../shared/preferences/geo-preferences-schema.json'); const schemaTarget=path.resolve('lib/browser/geo-preferences-schema.json'); fs.copySync(schemaSource, schemaTarget); const schemaModulePath=path.resolve('lib/browser/geo-preferences-schema.js'); const schemaModule=fs.readFileSync(schemaModulePath, 'utf8').replace('../../../../../shared/preferences/geo-preferences-schema.json', './geo-preferences-schema.json'); fs.writeFileSync(schemaModulePath, schemaModule);"
